title: Steve Leialoha
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Steve Leialoha''' (born [[January 27]], [[1950s|1952]]) is a comic book artist and [[Wikipedia:colorist|colorist]]. He inked and colored the early [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] issues with penciller [[Howard Chaykin]] and later returned to the title prior to its cancellation, inking [[Cynthia Martin]]'s pencils. He began in the comic industry contributing to the independent comic anthology [[Wikipedia:Star Reach|Star Reach]] in [[1975]]. He would later work for [[Marvel Comics]] in the 1970s and 80s on several titles including [[Wikipedia:Howard the Duck|''Howard the Duck'']] and [[Wikipedia:Spider-Woman (Jessica Drew)|''Spider-Woman'']]. He also drew for [[Wikipedia:DC Comics|DC Comics]] beginning in the late 1980s on titles such as [[Wikipedia:Batman|''Batman'']] and [[Wikipedia:The Sandman (DC Comics Modern Age)|''The Sandman'']].
